skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem:
36x² + bx + 49 = 0

In the given equation, b is a constant. For which of the following values of b will the equation have more than one real solution?
rationale: A quadratic has more than one real solution when its discriminant is positive: b² − 4(36)(49) > 0, i.e., b² > 7056, so |b| > 84. Of the four choices, only b = −97 satisfies this since |−97| = 97 > 84.
